name: inkscape-mcp
description: MCP server for Inkscape CLI-backed SVG and vector workflows (FastMCP 3.1+). Portmanteau tools: file, vector, analysis, system; optional sampling/agentic tools when dependencies are installed.

inkscape_path.title: Inkscape Executable Path
inkscape_path.description: Path to the Inkscape executable on your system

process_timeout.title: Operation Timeout (seconds)
process_timeout.description: Maximum time in seconds for Inkscape operations to complete

max_concurrent_processes.title: Max Concurrent Operations
max_concurrent_processes.description: Maximum number of concurrent Inkscape processes allowed

allowed_directories.title: Allowed Working Directories (comma-separated)
allowed_directories.description: Comma-separated list of directories where file operations are permitted

tools.name: inkscape_file
tools.description: File operations: load, convert, info, validate, list_formats (save may be limited; check server)

tools.name: inkscape_vector
tools.description: Vector operations: trace_image, boolean, path_simplify, render_preview, QR/barcode, query/measure, etc.

tools.name: inkscape_system
tools.description: System: status, version, diagnostics, help, config, extensions

tools.name: list_local_models
tools.description: List local LLM endpoints (Ollama / LM Studio) when available

tools.name: generate_heraldry
tools.description: Heraldic SVG generation (e.g. trumponia); optional post-processing via other tools
